rows.label: qev013901_MSG0001
rows.name: You're...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0002
rows.name:
Do you know about the incident recently where aliens 
were massacred at the hands of Earthlings?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_JNK0010
rows.name: Nod[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell her that you heard about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_JNK0020
rows.name: Explain[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell her that you were the one who resolved that case.

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0003
rows.name:
It is a very tragic thing. We should be joining hands, 
yet there are people who persecute them...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0004
rows.name: I haven't introduced myself. I am Eliza.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0005
rows.name:
I am someone campaigning for everyone living in this city 
to unite and live together cooperatively.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0006
rows.name:
So you were the one who saved them... 
I apologize for making you recall such painful things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0007
rows.name: We who are in this city should be properly joining hands...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0008
rows.name: I haven't introduced myself. I am Eliza.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0009
rows.name:
I am someone campaigning for everyone living in this city 
to unite and live together cooperatively.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_JNK0110
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_SEL0111
rows.name: Ask Eliza how she thinks things are going.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_JNK0120
rows.name: Doubt[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_SEL0121
rows.name: Tell Eliza that will be quite the challenge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0010
rows.name:
I don't think NLA is that bad of a city. 
It was originally a city with many races, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0011
rows.name:
Therefore, I want to draw inspiration from those methods 
and expand a better circle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0012
rows.name:
It certainly is difficult... 
But there must definitely be a good way...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0013
rows.name: We originally lived in a city where many races coexisted.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0014
rows.name:
I believe that if we draw inspiration from the methods 
we learned then, we can surely expand a better circle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0015
rows.name: Now, to return to the subject...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0016
rows.name:
The atrocious beings we were just discussing 
are obstructing our activities.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0017
rows.name:
Alex, was it... 
It seems they are operating as a team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0018
rows.name: However, we do not want to annihilate them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0019
rows.name:
We want to have a discussion with them first 
and have them understand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0020
rows.name: Just as Eliza-san says![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0021
rows.name:
No sudden pain! 
We have to proceed fairly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0022
rows.name:
Since you are from Elma's team, which is said to have 
a deep understanding of aliens,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0023
rows.name:
I thought you would act as a bridge with them, 
which is why I engaged in such a rude, long talk.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0024
rows.name:
For the future of this city, 
would you please persuade them?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0025
rows.name:
Thank you. Your choice will bring 
freedom and equality to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0026
rows.name: We already have information on Alex![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0027
rows.name:
Right now, he's at a place with a strange rock 
called Balance Rock in the Valley of Oblivion![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0028
rows.name: Innocent aliens might become victims again...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0029
rows.name: You absolutely have to stop Alex![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0030
rows.name:
It's okay, Alice. 
This person will surely stop him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0031
rows.name:
Even after the incident, Alex was still calling out to 
the Ma-non people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0032
rows.name:
So Alice and I have been going around warning them 
not to follow him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0033
rows.name: Perhaps that is why Alex has come to hold a grudge against us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0034
rows.name: He frequently sends threatening emails telling us to cease our activities.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0035
rows.name:
The friendship between the kindhearted Ma-non and Earthlings 
is just now starting to be nurtured...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0036
rows.name:
We cannot stop our activities at a time like this! 
Please go persuade Alex.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0037
rows.name:
Welcome back. 
I am glad you are safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0038
rows.name:
I cannot help but wonder why Earthlings must conflict with each other... 
Really, why...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0039
rows.name:
It was appropriate to ask for your cooperation. 
I have never seen him derive an answer to that extent before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0040
rows.name: I believe the day will surely come when we can understand each other.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0041
rows.name:
If we spread our activities from now on, 
this city will surely become a free and equal city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0042
rows.name: I thank you for your mercy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0043
rows.name: Welcome back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0044
rows.name:
That expression... 
It seems you were not able to obtain complete success.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0045
rows.name:
I cannot help but wonder why Earthlings must conflict with each other... 
Really, why...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0046
rows.name: If they rely on force, it is inevitable to counter with force.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0047
rows.name:
And if it comes to a battle, 
it is not strange for there to be casualties.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0048
rows.name: It breaks my heart, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0049
rows.name: In any case, Alex's activities will stop for a while with this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013901_MSG0050
rows.name:
All that remains is to spread our activities, 
and we will surely make this a free and equal city.[ST:wait ]
